title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran-Backed Houthis Enter War With Missile Attack on Israel
summary_full: Earlier, U.S. officials said an Iranian strike at a military base in Saudi Arabia injured 12 U.S. troops, one of the most serious breaches of American defenses since the war began.
